variables.name: promptInstruction
variables.value: {{if(variables.currentType = "blog"; "Summarise the key advice from this article into a Google Business Profile post. End with: Read the full guide at " + variables.currentUrl; if(variables.currentType = "area"; "Write a post promoting RG Extreme Pressure services in this specific local area. Mention 1-2 local property types or streets if they appear in the content. End with: Free quotes — call 07474 939398 or visit rgextremepressure.co.uk"; "Write a post promoting this specific service. Pull 1-2 real benefits or process details from the page content. End with: Free quotes — call 07474 939398 or visit " + variables.currentUrl))}}

mapper.data:
{{toJSON(object("model"; "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"; "max_tokens"; 400; "messages"; array(object("role"; "user"; "content"; "You are writing a Google Business Profile post for RG Extreme Pressure, a professional jet washing and pressure washing company based in Bath, Somerset. Owner: Robert Galazka. 111 five-star Google reviews.

Source page: " + variables.currentUrl + "
Topic: " + variables.currentTopic + "

Source content (first 2500 chars):
" + substring(variables.strippedContent; 0; 2500) + "

Instruction: " + variables.promptInstruction + "

General rules for ALL posts:
- 150-200 words
- Do NOT open with a question
- Open with a confident, specific statement
- Mention the 111 five-star reviews once, naturally, not at the start
- British English throughout
- No hashtags
- No em dashes
- Do not use the word transform
- Professional, direct, friendly tone

Return ONLY the post text. No intro, no explanation.")))))}}
